  "description": "Emeraldzone Business Support Services (EmeraldBSS), provides Business Advisory, Human Capital Interventions, Marketing Communication, Sales Capability Development and other broad Capacity Building Solutions among others, specific to each client&rsquo;s peculiar needs, to stand them out in their industry. We focus on Organization, People, Process and Technology to advance our outputs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Depot Sales Representative

Job Location: Akute, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	The Depot Sales Representative is responsible for driving product sales and customer acquisition within the assigned depot and surrounding territories.
	The role involves managing relationships with distributors, wholesalers, retailers, and key accounts to achieve sales targets, ensure product availability, and expand market share.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send CV to: hr@emeraldzone.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Depot Sales Representative Job at Emeraldzone Business Support Services




        
    

        
        Emeraldzone Business Support Services (EmeraldBSS), provides Business Advisory, Human Capital Interventions, Marketing Communication, Sales Capability Development and other broad Capacity Building Solutions among others, specific to each client’s peculiar needs, to stand them out in their industry. We focus on Organization, People, Process and Technology to advance our outputs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Depot Sales Representative

Job Location: Akute, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Depot Sales Representative is responsible for driving product sales and customer acquisition within the assigned depot and surrounding territories.
	The role involves managing relationships with distributors, wholesalers, retailers, and key accounts to achieve sales targets, ensure product availability, and expand market share.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Receptionist",
  "description": "2020 Hotels and Apartments stands as a beacon of luxury, seamlessly blending sophistication with modern design, setting the standard in the hospitality industry. With a focus on comfort and contemporary style, our properties&mdash;Apartment 2020 Guzape and Apartment 2020 Katampe&mdash;offer an unparalleled living and hospitality experience designed to leave a lasting impression.

Each of our thoughtfully designed rooms and apartments combines simplicity with elegance, delivering premium comfort while meeting the highest expectations of today&rsquo;s discerning travelers and residents. Whether for short stays or extended living, we provide a refined environment where quality, convenience, and exceptional service come together effortlessly.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location: Abuja

Requirements


	3 - 4 years of relevant experience in a similar position.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Customer service oriented with a passion for hospitality.
	Ability to work in a team and uder pressure.
	Proficiency in relevant tools and systems.


Why Work With Us?


	Competitive salary: N100,000 monthly.&nbsp;
	Career growth &amp; development.
	Friendly &amp; supportive work environment.&nbsp;
	Training and capacity building.
	Opportunity to take a difference.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: hr@2020hospitality.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	We are an equal opportunity employer.
	Be a part of a team that delivers excellence everyday.

Receptionist Job at 2020 Hotels and Apartments




        
    

        
        2020 Hotels and Apartments stands as a beacon of luxury, seamlessly blending sophistication with modern design, setting the standard in the hospitality industry. With a focus on comfort and contemporary style, our properties—Apartment 2020 Guzape and Apartment 2020 Katampe—offer an unparalleled living and hospitality experience designed to leave a lasting impression.

Each of our thoughtfully designed rooms and apartments combines simplicity with elegance, delivering premium comfort while meeting the highest expectations of today’s discerning travelers and residents. Whether for short stays or extended living, we provide a refined environment where quality, convenience, and exceptional service come together effortlessly.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location: Abuja

Requirements


	3 - 4 years of relevant experience in a similar position.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Customer service oriented with a passion for hospitality.
	Ability to work in a team and uder pressure.
	Proficiency in relevant tools and systems.


Why Work With Us?


	Competitive salary: N100,000 monthly. 
	Career growth & development.
	Friendly & supportive work environment. 
	Training and capacity building.
	Opportunity to take a difference.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	We are an equal opportunity employer.
	Be a part of a team that delivers excellence everyday.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Manager – Security Services Industry",
  "description": "Prowess Outsourcing Limited, a recruitment and consulting company, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager &ndash; Security Services Industry

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-Time

Job Summary


	The Business Development Manager will be responsible for driving revenue growth, expanding the company&rsquo;s client base, and strengthening strategic relationships within the security services industry.
	The role involves identifying business opportunities, securing contracts, managing client relationships, preparing proposals, and supporting the organization&rsquo;s overall growth strategy.
	The ideal candidate must possess strong marketing and negotiation skills, deep knowledge of the security industry, and the ability to convert prospects into long-term clients.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities within corporate, residential, industrial, government, and commercial sectors.
	Develop and implement strategic marketing and sales plans to achieve company revenue targets.
	Generate leads through networking, cold calling, referrals, and market research.
	Prepare and deliver professional business presentations, proposals, and quotations to prospective clients.
	Negotiate contracts and service agreements in line with company policies.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with existing and prospective clients.
	Conduct regular client visits to understand security needs and ensure customer satisfaction.
	Handle client inquiries, complaints, and service concerns professionally.
	Ensure high client retention through excellent relationship management.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and emerging opportunities in the security industry.
	Recommend innovative service offerings and business strategies to improve market positioning.
	Participate in industry events, exhibitions, and networking forums to promote the company brand.
	Work closely with operations and HR teams to ensure smooth onboarding and deployment of security personnel for new contracts.
	Support contract implementation and ensure service delivery aligns with agreed standards.
	Assist management in developing pricing strategies and service packages.
	Prepare weekly and monthly business development reports.
	Maintain an updated database of leads, prospects, and client engagements.
	Track sales performance against targets and provide management with actionable insights.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications
Educational Qualification:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Marketing, Management, Social Sciences, or related field.
	Professional certifications in Sales, Marketing, or Business Development will be an added advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 3&ndash;5 years of cognate experience in business development, sales, or marketing within the security services industry or related service industry.
	Proven track record of winning contracts and achieving sales targets.


Age Requirement:


	Applicants must be between 25&ndash;40 years of age.


Required Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Excellent negotiation and persuasion abilities.
	Strong networking and relationship management skills.
	Ability to prepare professional proposals and presentations.
	Good understanding of security operations and industry dynamics.
	Strategic thinking and problem-solving ability.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and CRM tools.
	Ability to work independently and under pressure to meet targets.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: prowessoutsourcing@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Business Development Manager – Security Services Industry Job at Prowess Outsourcing Limited




        
    

        
        Prowess Outsourcing Limited, a recruitment and consulting company, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager – Security Services Industry

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-Time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Business Development Manager will be responsible for driving revenue growth, expanding the company’s client base, and strengthening strategic relationships within the security services industry.
	The role involves identifying business opportunities, securing contracts, managing client relationships, preparing proposals, and supporting the organization’s overall growth strategy.
	The ideal candidate must possess strong marketing and negotiation skills, deep knowledge of the security industry, and the ability to convert prospects into long-term clients.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities within corporate, residential, industrial, government, and commercial sectors.
	Develop and implement strategic marketing and sales plans to achieve company revenue targets.
	Generate leads through networking, cold calling, referrals, and market research.
	Prepare and deliver professional business presentations, proposals, and quotations to prospective clients.
	Negotiate contracts and service agreements in line with company policies.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with existing and prospective clients.
	Conduct regular client visits to understand security needs and ensure customer satisfaction.
	Handle client inquiries, complaints, and service concerns professionally.
	Ensure high client retention through excellent relationship management.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and emerging opportunities in the security industry.
	Recommend innovative service offerings and business strategies to improve market positioning.
	Participate in industry events, exhibitions, and networking forums to promote the company brand.
	Work closely with operations and HR teams to ensure smooth onboarding and deployment of security personnel for new contracts.
	Support contract implementation and ensure service delivery aligns with agreed standards.
	Assist management in developing pricing strategies and service packages.
	Prepare weekly and monthly business development reports.
	Maintain an updated database of leads, prospects, and client engagements.
	Track sales performance against targets and provide management with actionable insights.


Requirements & Qualifications
Educational Qualification:


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Marketing, Management, Social Sciences, or related field.
	Professional certifications in Sales, Marketing, or Business Development will be an added advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 3–5 years of cognate experience in business development, sales, or marketing within the security services industry or related service industry.
	Proven track record of winning contracts and achieving sales targets.


Age Requirement:


	Applicants must be between 25–40 years of age.


Required Skills & Competencies:


	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Excellent negotiation and persuasion abilities.
	Strong networking and relationship management skills.
	Ability to prepare professional proposals and presentations.
	Good understanding of security operations and industry dynamics.
	Strategic thinking and problem-solving ability.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and CRM tools.
	Ability to work independently and under pressure to meet targets.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance Manager (Female)",
  "description": "Prowess Outsourcing Limited, a recruitment and consulting company, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager (Female)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Chief Financial Officer (CFO) / Managing Director
Industry: Security Services

Job Summary&nbsp;


	The Finance Manager will be responsible for overseeing all financial operations of the organisation, ensuring sound financial management, regulatory compliance, and strategic financial planning in support of the company&#39;s growth objectives within the security services industry.
	The ideal candidate will bring hands-on experience in a similar financial management role within security, facilities management, or related service industries.


Key Responsibilities&nbsp;


	Develop and manage the company&#39;s annual budget, financial forecasts, and long-term financial plans.
	Conduct variance analysis and provide actionable insights to senior management on financial performance.
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports in line with regulatory and management requirements.
	Monitor cash flow, working capital, and liquidity to ensure the company meets its financial obligations.
	Oversee day-to-day accounting operations including accounts payable, accounts receivable, payroll, and general ledger.
	Ensure accurate and timely preparation of financial statements in compliance with IFRS/GAAP or applicable local accounting standards.
	Coordinate and manage external and internal audits, ensuring timely resolution of audit findings.
	Maintain proper books of accounts and ensure all financial records are up to date and audit-ready.
	Ensure compliance with all relevant tax regulations (VAT, PAYE, corporate tax, etc.) and statutory obligations.
	Liaise with regulatory bodies, external auditors, and tax authorities as required.
	Implement and monitor adherence to internal financial controls and company finance policies.
	Stay current with changes in financial regulations applicable to the security services sector.
	Analyse the financial implications of contracts, bids, and service agreements within the security services business.
	Monitor and manage operational costs, including personnel, equipment, and logistics, to ensure profitability on all contracts.
	Work closely with operations and business development teams to provide financial input on pricing and proposals.
	Supervise and mentor finance team members, fostering a culture of accuracy, accountability, and continuous improvement.
	Serve as the primary financial liaison with banks, investors, insurance providers, and other financial institutions.
	Present financial performance reports and strategic recommendations to senior leadership and the Board as required.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements
Educational Requirements:


	Bachelor&#39;s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related discipline.
	Professional certification (ACA, ACCA, CIMA, CPA, or equivalent) is an added advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 3 &ndash; 5 years of progressive experience in a finance management or senior finance role.
	Cognate experience in the security services, or related service industry is required.


Technical Skills:


	Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage, SAP, or similar ERP platforms).
	Advanced Microsoft Excel skills (pivot tables, financial modelling, data analysis).
	Strong knowledge of FIRS, tax regulations, and financial compliance frameworks.
	Experience with payroll systems and managing multi-site or contract-based financial operations.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: prowessoutsourcing@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Finance Manager (Female) Job at Prowess Outsourcing Limited




        
    

        
        Prowess Outsourcing Limited, a recruitment and consulting company, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager (Female)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Chief Financial Officer (CFO) / Managing Director
Industry: Security Services

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Finance Manager will be responsible for overseeing all financial operations of the organisation, ensuring sound financial management, regulatory compliance, and strategic financial planning in support of the company's growth objectives within the security services industry.
	The ideal candidate will bring hands-on experience in a similar financial management role within security, facilities management, or related service industries.


Key Responsibilities 


	Develop and manage the company's annual budget, financial forecasts, and long-term financial plans.
	Conduct variance analysis and provide actionable insights to senior management on financial performance.
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports in line with regulatory and management requirements.
	Monitor cash flow, working capital, and liquidity to ensure the company meets its financial obligations.
	Oversee day-to-day accounting operations including accounts payable, accounts receivable, payroll, and general ledger.
	Ensure accurate and timely preparation of financial statements in compliance with IFRS/GAAP or applicable local accounting standards.
	Coordinate and manage external and internal audits, ensuring timely resolution of audit findings.
	Maintain proper books of accounts and ensure all financial records are up to date and audit-ready.
	Ensure compliance with all relevant tax regulations (VAT, PAYE, corporate tax, etc.) and statutory obligations.
	Liaise with regulatory bodies, external auditors, and tax authorities as required.
	Implement and monitor adherence to internal financial controls and company finance policies.
	Stay current with changes in financial regulations applicable to the security services sector.
	Analyse the financial implications of contracts, bids, and service agreements within the security services business.
	Monitor and manage operational costs, including personnel, equipment, and logistics, to ensure profitability on all contracts.
	Work closely with operations and business development teams to provide financial input on pricing and proposals.
	Supervise and mentor finance team members, fostering a culture of accuracy, accountability, and continuous improvement.
	Serve as the primary financial liaison with banks, investors, insurance providers, and other financial institutions.
	Present financial performance reports and strategic recommendations to senior leadership and the Board as required.


Qualifications & Requirements
Educational Requirements:


	Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related discipline.
	Professional certification (ACA, ACCA, CIMA, CPA, or equivalent) is an added advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 3 – 5 years of progressive experience in a finance management or senior finance role.
	Cognate experience in the security services, or related service industry is required.


Technical Skills:


	Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage, SAP, or similar ERP platforms).
	Advanced Microsoft Excel skills (pivot tables, financial modelling, data analysis).
	Strong knowledge of FIRS, tax regulations, and financial compliance frameworks.
	Experience with payroll systems and managing multi-site or contract-based financial operations.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales & Marketing Executive",
  "description": "Aura Wellness is a luxurious blend of spa treatments and wellness services center designed to refresh the body, calm the mind, and restore inner balance. We are located in Lekki 1, Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales &amp; Marketing Executive

Job Location: Lekki 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Promotes the spa brand, drives customer acquisition, and manages marketing campaigns.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage social media marketing
	Create promotional campaigns
	Generate leads and partnerships
	Increase client bookings and retention
	Track marketing performance


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified applicants should send their CV to: aurawellnessng@gmail.com using the Job position as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-26",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-11",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
